response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The first half is a live-action skit with no musical references; the second half (03:38 - 05:00) contains the song 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE', which matches the reference lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference song lyrics for the musical segment, while performing precise manual transcription and translation for the initial skit and VTuber introduction scenes. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles perfectly to match the actors' dialogue delivery in the first half and mapped the fast-paced song lyrics precisely to the vocals in the second half.

subtitles.original: You're making so much noise!
subtitles.english: You're making so much noise!

subtitles.original: Sorry, my... my shoes are just really big and clunky.
subtitles.english: Sorry, my... my shoes are just really big and clunky.

subtitles.original: You know what? I think it'd be really cool if we were to do 50 push-ups right now.
subtitles.english: You know what? I think it'd be really cool if we were to do 50 push-ups right now.

subtitles.original: I... I want to do... You know what, I want to do 50 push-ups!
subtitles.english: I... I want to do... You know what, I want to do 50 push-ups!

subtitles.original: Me? I really want to... - No, no, no...
subtitles.english: Me? I really want to... - No, no, no...

subtitles.original: I really... I really want to do 50 push-ups.
subtitles.english: I really... I really want to do 50 push-ups.

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, wait, I changed my mind. - Oh, you changed your mind? - I want...
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, wait, I changed my mind. - Oh, you changed your mind? - I want...

subtitles.original: I want, um... 50 lunges!
subtitles.english: I want, um... 50 lunges!

subtitles.original: 50 lunges? - Oh, oh, your knee hurts?
subtitles.english: 50 lunges? - Oh, oh, your knee hurts?

subtitles.original: Oh... yeah, I got into an accident about 200 years ago.
subtitles.english: Oh... yeah, I got into an accident about 200 years ago.

subtitles.original: Did you get hit by a car? - I got hit by a car 200 years ago.
subtitles.english: Did you get hit by a car? - I got hit by a car 200 years ago.

subtitles.original: Okay, I guess that's just how it is.
subtitles.english: Okay, I guess that's just how it is.

subtitles.original: You know what, Chichimori? - Don't touch me!
subtitles.english: You know what, Chichimori? - Don't touch me!

subtitles.original: Stop touching me. - Stop touching me!
subtitles.english: Stop touching me. - Stop touching me!

subtitles.original: What? Why are you always fighting with me? You're just always fighting!
subtitles.english: What? Why are you always fighting with me? You're just always fighting!

subtitles.original: Why are you always fighting? I hate you! I hate you! I hate you!
subtitles.english: Why are you always fighting? I hate you! I hate you! I hate you!

subtitles.original: I hate you so much! I hate your hair!
subtitles.english: I hate you so much! I hate your hair!

subtitles.original: Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey... - Sorry, sorry, sorry.
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey... - Sorry, sorry, sorry.

subtitles.original: I got... sorry, I was being mean. I was acting out. Do you forgive me?
subtitles.english: I got... sorry, I was being mean. I was acting out. Do you forgive me?

subtitles.original: I guess so.
subtitles.english: I guess so.

subtitles.original: I'm sorry for yelling. - I'm sorry for yelling at you.
subtitles.english: I'm sorry for yelling. - I'm sorry for yelling at you.

subtitles.original: I didn't mean to. Can you kiss my knee, please?
subtitles.english: I didn't mean to. Can you kiss my knee, please?

subtitles.original: I feel really good now.
subtitles.english: I feel really good now.

subtitles.original: Do you feel better? - I feel better.
subtitles.english: Do you feel better? - I feel better.

subtitles.original: And I feel really sleepy all of a sudden.
subtitles.english: And I feel really sleepy all of a sudden.

subtitles.original: Me too, actually. I'm so sleepy.
subtitles.english: Me too, actually. I'm so sleepy.

subtitles.original: I'm so sleepy.
subtitles.english: I'm so sleepy.

subtitles.original: But there's only one bed! What should we do? Should we get in together?
subtitles.english: But there's only one bed! What should we do? Should we get in together?

subtitles.original: I guess so. I guess we'll get into... Let me just take off my shoes.
subtitles.english: I guess so. I guess we'll get into... Let me just take off my shoes.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, I think it would be really, really weird to get into bed with shoes on. - Yeah, that would be strange.
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, I think it would be really, really weird to get into bed with shoes on. - Yeah, that would be strange.

subtitles.original: But let me help you. Let me fluff this pillow for you. Oh, you look so...
subtitles.english: But let me help you. Let me fluff this pillow for you. Oh, you look so...

subtitles.original: Here you go, princess.
subtitles.english: Here you go, princess.

subtitles.original: Okay, let me... Let me just lay down.
subtitles.english: Okay, let me... Let me just lay down.

subtitles.original: Oh, let me get into bed too. I have to take my shoes off too. - I'm already getting so comfortable.
subtitles.english: Oh, let me get into bed too. I have to take my shoes off too. - I'm already getting so comfortable.

subtitles.original: Please, please, don't go to bed without me!
subtitles.english: Please, please, don't go to bed without me!

subtitles.original: I'm so tired. If someone doesn't get into bed quick, I'm just going to fall asleep without you.
subtitles.english: I'm so tired. If someone doesn't get into bed quick, I'm just going to fall asleep without you.

subtitles.original: Oh, no, don't, don't! It's just my... my achy-achy bones. I'm trying to get into bed, please!
subtitles.english: Oh, no, don't, don't! It's just my... my achy-achy bones. I'm trying to get into bed, please!

subtitles.original: I guess your knee really hurts still. - It does. Oh, I feel so comfortable.
subtitles.english: I guess your knee really hurts still. - It does. Oh, I feel so comfortable.

subtitles.original: Thanks for coming to my tea party, Cece.
subtitles.english: Thanks for coming to my tea party, Cece.

subtitles.original: Thanks for inviting me, Chichimori. - Good night.
subtitles.english: Thanks for inviting me, Chichimori. - Good night.

subtitles.original: Oh, oh, we're holding hands. - It's because I get scared in the dark.
subtitles.english: Oh, oh, we're holding hands. - It's because I get scared in the dark.

subtitles.original: Oh, of course. Yeah, yeah. - So I'm glad that we have each other. Good night, Cece.
subtitles.english: Oh, of course. Yeah, yeah. - So I'm glad that we have each other. Good night, Cece.

subtitles.original: Good night, Chichimori. - Good night.
subtitles.english: Good night, Chichimori. - Good night.

subtitles.original: I'm Cece! - And I'm Chichimori!
subtitles.english: I'm Cece! - And I'm Chichimori!

subtitles.original: And you're watching... - The Autofist Network!
subtitles.english: And you're watching... - The Autofist Network!

subtitles.original: I don't know if that's going to make us any money.
subtitles.english: I don't know if that's going to make us any money.

subtitles.original: Well, on to the next idea!
subtitles.english: Well, on to the next idea!

subtitles.original: みんなが大好 きっ!!
subtitles.english: Everyone's favorite...!!

subtitles.original: 延々続行 ルララ miracle sing time
subtitles.english: It's our never-ending lu-la-la miracle sing time

subtitles.original: 歌って 歌って 愛伝える最強手段
subtitles.english: I'll sing, I'll sing, it's the absolute best way to express my love!

subtitles.original: つたない曲でも 微妙な歌詞でも
subtitles.english: Even if the composition is clumsy or the lyrics are iffy

subtitles.original: 届けたい 精一杯のsoulを
subtitles.english: I want to convey my soul with all I have!

subtitles.original: どうしよう オートマティックに決められてる
subtitles.english: What can we do, with this timetable...

subtitles.original: 時間割じゃ追っつかないの
subtitles.english: ...that's been automatically decided for us.

subtitles.original: 夢 無限 したいこと 怒涛
subtitles.english: Billowing waves of us infinite dreamers...

subtitles.original: 廊下もダッシュで集まるよ
subtitles.english: ...dash out and assemble in the hallway!

subtitles.original: お行儀悪かったら sorry! でも
subtitles.english: Sorry if my manners are bad! But...

subtitles.original: なりふりも構わずに
subtitles.english: ...don't mind how I look.

subtitles.original: どっぷりハマっちゃう play
subtitles.english: I'm totally addicted to playing...

subtitles.original: キラリって もしやこれが青春
subtitles.english: ...a sparkle, maybe this is what youth is!

subtitles.original: ever ever... forever shine
subtitles.english: Ever ever... forever shine

subtitles.original: ほんとに 大好 きっ!!
subtitles.english: I really love you!!

subtitles.original: テンション上昇 ルララ powerful gig time
subtitles.english: It's a tension-rising lu-la-la powerful gig time

subtitles.original: ハートって ハートって ワクワク探す天才
subtitles.english: My heart is, my heart is, an excitement-seeking genius

subtitles.original: アレッ!?って言われても ミス連発でも
subtitles.english: Even if I say "Huh!?" or start racking up misses

subtitles.original: 放ちたい 湧いてくる braveを
subtitles.english: I want to set free my boiling bravery

subtitles.original: し かける トレモロ 応える フラム
subtitles.english: On with the tremolo, followed by flam

subtitles.original: いいじゃん いいじゃん ノリノリで いんじゃない
subtitles.english: Ain't it awesome, ain't it awesome, ain't it awesome to feel so good

subtitles.original: ハッピーは いつだってね “今”感じるもの
subtitles.english: I'm always so happy, it's the way "now" feels
